name: codex-pro
description: Advanced Codex integration for Claude Code — drop-in upgrade for openai/codex-plugin-cc with ensemble pattern, hard timeouts, circuit breaker, and structured observability. v0.3: adds /codex-pro:status, /codex-pro:result, /codex-pro:cancel triple (read-only consumer category), completing the drop-in surface — 7/7 codex-plugin-cc commands now have codex-pro counterparts (setup / batch / review / rescue / adversarial-review / status / result / cancel).
